case_title: CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INC., DBA GREAT VS. SAKHUJA FAMILY HOLDINGS, LLC et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INC., DBA GREAT WESTERN COLLECTION BUREAU SERVED MAR-16-2011, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT DIGITAL PREPRESS INTERNATIONAL, INC

DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INC'S MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWER TO POST-JUDGMENT DISCOVERY AND FOR AWARD OF MONETARY SANCTIONS. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: NO OPPOSITION FILED. THE MOTION IS GRANTED. THE DEFENDANTS SAKHUJA FAMILY HOLDINGS, LLC; SAKHUJA FAMILY HOLDINGS-MARIPOSA, LLC; SAKHUJA FAMILY HOLDINGS II, LLC; DIGITAL PREPRESS INTERNATIONAL, INC. AND SANJAY SAKHUJA, INDIVIDUALLY DBA DIGITAL PREPRESS INTERNATIONAL SHALL EACH FURNISH RESPONSES TO PLAINTIFF'S POST JUDGMENT INTERROGATORIES AND PLAINTIFF'S POST JUDGMENT DEMANDS FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS AND TANGIBLE THINGS WITHIN FIFTEEN DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. FURTHER, THE DEFENDANTS SHALL PAY MONETARY SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $340 TO PLAINTIFF WITHIN FIFTEEN DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. PLAINTIFF TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE PRO TEM: MARK SCHREIBER; NOT REPORTED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INC., DBA GREAT WESTERN COLLECTION BUREAU RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SAKHUJA FAMILY HOLDINGS, LLC SAKHUJA FAMILY HOLDINGS-MARIPOSA, LLC SAKHUJA FAMILY HOLDINGS II, LLC DIGITAL PREPRESS INTERNATIONAL, INC SANJAY SAKHUJA, INDIVIDUALLY DBA DIGITAL PRE-PRESS INTERNATIONAL $1,000.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $1,212.75 INTEREST, $560.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,772.75, SEE SCANNED DOC

Plaintiff Creditor'S Trade Motion To Compel Answer To Post-Judgment Discovery And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Aug-17-2012 Text Ruling

Ntc Of Mtn To Compel Answer To Post-Judgment Discovery And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions; Memo Of P & A; Dec And Pos
Off Calendar Aug-17-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INC'S MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWER TO POST-JUDGMENT DISCOVERY AND FOR AWARD OF MONETARY SANCTIONS.
There being no appearances, the parties are deemed to have stipulated to the matter being decided by a Judge Pro Tem. The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: No opposition filed. The motion is granted. The defendants SAKHUJA FAMILY HOLDINGS, LLC; SAKHUJA FAMILY HOLDINGS-MARIPOSA, LLC; SAKHUJA FAMILY HOLDINGS II, LLC; DIGITAL PREPRESS INTERNATIONAL, INC. AND SANJAY SAKHUJA, INDIVIDUALLY DBA DIGITAL PREPRESS INTERNATIONAL shall each furnish responses to Plaintiff's Post Judgment Interrogatories and Plaintiff's Post Judgment Demands for Production of Documents and Tangible Things within fifteen days of notice of this order. Further, the defendants shall pay monetary sanctions in the amount of $340 to plaintiff within fifteen days of notice of this order. Plaintiff to submit a proposed form of order. (302/JPT) Judge Pro Tem: Mark Schreiber; Not reported
